title: corunastylis tecta
intro: Corunastylis tecta, also known as the hooded orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Corunastylis tecta can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
